revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[be:Ісэ]][[ca:Ise]][[ceb:Ise]][[cs:Ise]][[da:Ise]][[de:Ise]][[en:Ise]][[eo:ISE]][[es:Ise]][[et:ISE]][[fa:ایسه]][[fi:Ise]][[fr:Ise]][[id:Ise]][[it:Ise]][[ja:伊勢]][[ko:이세]][[lt:Isė]][[nl:Ise]][[pl:Ise]][[pt:ISE]][[ro:Ise (dezambiguizare)]][[ru:Исэ]][[simple:Ise]][[sv:Ise]][[zh:伊勢]]
'''Ise''' may refer to: {{TOC right}} ==Places== *{{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|qid=Q328067|lt=Ise, Mie|1=Ise, Mie}}, a city in Japan **[[Ise Grand Shrines]], a Shinto shrine located in Ise, Mie *{{ill|Ise Ekiti|en|Ise Ekiti|qid=Q3140630|lt=Ise Ekiti|1=Ise Ekiti}}, a city in Nigeria *{{ill|Ise, Norway|en|Ise, Norway|qid=Q1772264|lt=Ise, Norway|1=Ise, Norway}}, a village in Norway *{{ill|Ise Province|en|Ise Province|qid=Q864166|lt=Ise Province|1=Ise Province}}, an ancient province of Japan *{{ill|River Ise|en|River Ise|qid=Q7337523|lt=River Ise|1=River Ise}}, a tributary of the River Nene in Northamptonshire, England *{{ill|Ise (river)|en|Ise (river)|qid=Q316186|lt=Ise (river)|1=Ise (river)}}, a tributary of the Aller in Lower Saxony, Germany *{{ill|Ise Bay|en|Ise Bay|qid=Q1368308|lt=Ise Bay|1=Ise Bay}}, a bay in Japan
==People with the name== *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Mariya Ise|en|Mariya Ise|qid=Q1333938|lt=Mariya Ise|1=Mariya Ise}}|伊瀬 茉莉也}} (born 1988), Japanese actress *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Takemi Ise|en|Takemi Ise|qid=Q28911824|lt=Takemi Ise|1=Takemi Ise}}|伊勢 多恵美||born 1963}}, Japanese swimmer *{{ill|Lady Ise|en|Lady Ise|qid=Q272077|lt=Lady Ise|1=Lady Ise}} (c. 875–c. 938), a famous poet in ancient Japan *Ise, stylized as ISE, Danish female singer and participant in Danish version of ''{{ill|X Factor (Danish TV series)|en|X Factor (Danish TV series)|qid=Q591519|lt=The X Factor|1=X Factor (Danish TV series)}}''
==Other uses== *''{{ill|The Tales of Ise|en|The Tales of Ise|qid=Q1539995|lt=The Tales of Ise|1=The Tales of Ise}}'' (''Ise monogatari''), a collection of Heian period Japanese waka poetry *[[:en:Ise Nanao|Ise Nanao]], a character in the manga and anime series ''Bleach'' *{{ill|Japanese battleship Ise|en|Japanese battleship Ise|qid=Q1198671|lt=Japanese battleship ''Ise''|1=Japanese battleship Ise}}, a battleship of the Imperial Japanese Navy, named after the province * [[:en:JDS Ise (DDH-182)|JDS Ise (DDH-182)]], Japanese helicopter carrier *[[:en:-ise|-ise]], a suffix also spelled "-ize".
==See also== * [[:en:ISE (disambiguation)|ISE (disambiguation)]]
{{disambiguation|geo|surname}}
[[en:Ise]]
